hooks.command:
/bin/sh -lc 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd "$root" || exit 0; printf "
[Codex scope guard]
repo: %s
" "$root"; printf "branch: "; git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f .gitnexus/run.cjs ]; then node .gitnexus/run.cjs status || true; fi; printf "changed files:
"; git status --short; git diff --check || true'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking repo scope before final response
